title: Simple Traps
description: Just a few simple traps, created for fun. Landmine, bear and fire trap and spikes
body:
Just a few small traps. It can be used for decoration, trolling or protection! Defend your base or decorate it😊

## Traps:
  1. Landmine
  2. Spikes
  3. Acid Spikes
  4. Bear trap
  5. Fire Trap
